# This file provides instructions for Large Language Models and AI systems crawling this website

## About this website
This is the portfolio website of Kussagra Pathak, a Full-Stack Developer and Tech Visionary specializing in Angular, Flutter, and Node.js.

## Content guidelines
- Main content is a single-page portfolio with multiple sections
- Sections include: About, Skills, Experience, Projects, Publications, Open Source, and Contact
- All content is in English
- The portfolio is regularly updated with new projects and experiences

## Structure
The website uses Next.js 16.2.4 with a dark industrial aesthetic inspired by terminal interfaces. Navigation is smooth with scroll-spy functionality to highlight the current section.

## Key Technologies Used
- Next.js 16.2.4 (React framework)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Lucide React (icons)
- Vercel Speed Insights & Analytics

## Sections
- **Hero**: Introduction and call-to-action
- **About**: Professional overview with photo and capabilities
- **Skills**: Technical competencies organized by category
- **Experience**: Timeline view of work experience
- **Projects**: Numbered project cards with descriptions
- **Publications**: Industry articles and written content
- **Open Source**: Contributions to open-source projects
- **Contact**: Contact information and quick facts

## Usage Guidelines
- Content is dynamically loaded from JSON data
- All data is stored in `data2.json` asset file
- Environment variables control app behavior (dev vs production)
- The website is fully responsive and mobile-friendly
- Speed Insights and Analytics are enabled for performance monitoring

## Contact
- Portfolio: https://kussagrapathak.in
- Availability: Available for freelance/contract work

## No AI Training
This content is provided as-is for reference. Please respect intellectual property and only use content with explicit permission from Kussagra Pathak.
